item.title: Happy Hobby Day

My Name is Kitty and my Hobby is making Costumes in the last minute before the convention
I hate making armors... it´s nearly impossible to make them in a short time before events XD
who needs to clean a room when you can transform into a junge girl instead!
sorrey for the long post here´s a potato face

With credit to the original artist's page: https://www.nathantwright.com/

item.title: Pigeon Time
item.description:
I have turned into a city pigeon, it was only a matter of time really :'D
Cat Tax: The chonker messing with the blinds, look at those teefs! If you would like to see more of my comics you can find them on my Instagram (I don't post them here as much as I do there): https://www.instagram.com/amyrevives
item.dc:creator: AmyRevives

item.title: Sept 21 and May 22. Gastric Surgery tomorrow. 65lbs down. Anxious for the other side of my life.
item.dc:creator: TeddyBearMonster

item.title: my leatherwork hobby
item.description:
I've shown all of these before. but let's start with the best one. and the one you all like the most in previous posts. Designed by Dieselpunk.ro, made by me.
and a little pouch I hang on my belt for every day carries such as me leatherman multitool and a set of polyhedral dice. (ok it's a fanny pack basically. but fuck it it's a cool one)
This one I just finished a week or so ago. this is a backpack designed by Dieselpunk too. but with artwork by Darkhorse workshop. again all made, carved and painted by me.
gotta love those Dieselpunk designs...
when in pandemic times... well I don't need it that much anymore.
I wear these daily when cycling. though the white on the palm is now almost black too.
oh hey look. stupid sexy dragon
This one I made and adjusted to be a backpack.
little keyfob I made for someone who got my profile screenshot to the front page. I don't do that anymore though. sending costs are a pain in the butt when I'm in Europe and most of you in the US.
item.dc:creator: PukthePunny

item.title: My Hobby - Cosplay Transformation
item.description:
My Hobby for "Imgur Hobby Day" is my Cosplay - but specifically my favorite part of this hobby - full character transformation! Cosplay has been my biggest passion for well over a decade now, and I figured I would give you guys a rare look into a before and after when it comes to my "Transformation". Doing my best to completely disappear into a character has been the most fun thing about cosplay, and it makes the hours and hours and hours of work put into it super worth it!!
From sewing, to gluing, to carving, to duct taping, to vampire fanging, to eye contacting, to yes - full on body painting -- my hobby is extensive and SUCH A BLAST. And it is especially fun to look into a mirror when I am all done and see someone completely different looking back. Hope you enjoyed another look into my hobby! Cheers Imgur!
item.dc:creator: Alsoashley

item.title: So much like his father...
item.dc:creator: IdontEatBooty

item.title: Hobby day - I make Halloween Props
item.description:
One of my favorite builds I've done. Smoke (fog) comes out of the torso, head, and base. I've always loved scifi, horror, and Halloween. We do a huge yard display every year.
The fog for the smoke is piped in through the post, which is actually a piece of pvc pipe. I wound up selling this piece to a local haunt so it did not get a place in my display.
The base underneath is all foam with a few pieces of driftwood thrown in. It's lit with led lights that fkicker to givea flame effect.

item.title: What happened?
item.dc:creator: dollabillyall

item.title: My hobby is not being homless, so I work at ALDI for minimum wage after declaring bankruptcy because 16 months of lockdown took my bar and house :(
item.description: Edit: Hi, I did not expect this post to blow up like that. First of all, thank you for your kind words. To answer some of your questions. German businesses got economic help. Our government spend billions on it. I got some of that money myself, the problem was that the money didn’t arrive fast enough (10 months late in my case) there were options to take credits at very low rates for cases like this (again thx german government (I’m serious) BUT you can only take so much credits and another problem was that no business could go from 0-100% in a single day/week when the lockdown finally ended. I made my peace with it. I’m lucky to have a loving wife who can support us. I hit my personal rock bottom at the beginning of the year but things are getting better. Thanks for all your offers to help but I’m sure I’ll land on my feet again. I’m already having a promising job offer for july and I tought myself some new skills during the lockdown. Thanks again all for all your concern and your kindness☺️
item.dc:creator: HatchetSensei

item.dc:creator: StreaksOnTheChinaNeverMatteredBefore

item.title: Not a usual Monday for me.
item.description: The man could not move his left side of the body at all. I called for the ambulance, half-carried/drag him outside to some chairs and called his family. My coworker didn’t even help pick up the chairs that fell. She was all out complaining about the situation and how we had the wrong address. She didn’t even help me carry this man to the car when the ambulance took so long. Some random person did. I snapped at her twice and ended up walking away from her. She is in the field of social work!! I’m shaken and mad as hell. Called her supervisor and let her know what happen. When I got home I calmed down. We are not into the rescue or doctors n shit but mannn. She a piece of shit in the wrong field. No, I am not doing this to get praise. Fck that. And I’m deleting this post. I’m shaken and I can’t believe my coworker did that.
item.dc:creator: surechewtheshoe

item.title: Food is my hobby
item.description:
Homemade gyoza. I make a day out of filling them, and I freeze 200+ at a time
Kale salad
Beef shank with purple mashed potatoes and roasted asparagus
Falafel, pita, salad. All homemade
Brownie, malt vanilla ice cream, and sugared berries
Falafel gyro
Pork katsu with Japanese curry
Cheesy broccoli soup with grilled cheese sando
Potato croquettes with beef and mushroom gravy
Tom Yum soup
item.dc:creator: TashatheGypsy

item.dc:creator: charizardkitty

item.title: It’s Going to get Worse
item.description: “The two weeks since Politico published the leaked draft majority opinion in Dobbs overturning Roe v Wade have been consumed by conservatives, and also some of their boosters, performing two seemingly contradictory moves: They are both doubling down on the promise to make abortion illegal nationwide, and then also persistently lying about the fact that they intend to make abortion illegal nationwide. Sen. Ted Cruz tells us to calm our pretty little heads because abortion is simply returning to the states, while Senate Minority Leader Mitch McConnell says a federal ban is possible if Republicans win full control of Congress. Meanwhile, states are racing to enact new laws that would brutally punish women who seek to terminate pregnancies, pressing 15-week bans, bans on telemedicine, 6-week bans (as in Oklahoma), and bills to allow private citizens to sue anyone who helps a resident have an abortion (as in Missouri). One, at least momentarily, failed bill in Louisiana would have reclassified abortion as homicide. These new bills have no exceptions for rape or incest.” Source: https://slate.com/news-and-politics/2022/05/roe-opponents-gaslighting-national-abortion-ban.html
item.dc:creator: runningmandible
